title: CUHP Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: CUHP Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Central University of Himachal Pradesh Result 2026 declared for 1st and 3rd semester MFA, MCA, MSc (Bioinformatics, Mathematics, Environmental Sciences) and MA (New Media, Hindu Studies, History, Hindi) exams for academic year 2025-26 on the official website - cuhimachal.ac.in on 30 March 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the CUHP result.

content.text: Central University of Himachal Pradesh has officially released the CUHP Result 2026 for various PG programmes for the academic session 2025-26, including 1st and 3rd semester MFA, MCA, MSc and MA examinations held in December 2025. Reappear examination results have been declared for MFA (Sculpture) I Sem Batch-2024, MSc (Bioinformatics) I Sem Batch-2023, MCA I Sem Batch-2024 and MCA III Sem Batch-2023, along with reappear results for MA (New Media) I Sem Batch-2024 and MA (Hindu Studies) I Sem Batch-2024. Regular examination results are available for MSc (Mathematics) III Sem Batch-2024, MSc (Environmental Sciences) I Sem Batch-2025, MFA (Sculpture) III Sem Batch-2024, MFA (Painting) III Sem Batch-2024, MA (History) I Sem Batch-2025, MA (Hindu Studies) I Sem Batch-2025, MA (Hindu Studies) III Sem Batch-2024 and MA (Hindi) III Sem Batch-2024, all dated 30 March 2026.

CUHP Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - cuhimachal.ac.in - through the PG results section available in the student corner. Students can check and download their CUHP PG results by opening the PG result page, selecting the relevant course and semester link and entering their roll number or other login credentials if required. After viewing the online marksheet, candidates are advised to verify their personal details, course name, batch, semester, subject wise marks and overall result status and immediately contact the university examination branch in case of any discrepancy.

Central University of Himachal Pradesh has issued a comprehensive set of PG 1st and 3rd semester results covering both regular and reappear examinations for the 2025-26 academic session. The latest update includes results for technical, science, arts and fine arts programmes, allowing students from multiple batches (2023, 2024 and 2025) to check their performance and progression status online.

Central University of Himachal Pradesh has activated the PG result portal where all newly declared December 2025 exam results for the 2025-26 session are listed course wise. Students can use the direct link given below to open the CUHP PG result page and then access the specific result notification for their course, batch and semester.

CUHP Reappear Examination Result 2026 - MFA, MCA, MSc, MA (Selected Batches and Semesters)
CUHP Regular Examination Result 2026 - MSc, MFA, MA (Selected Batches and Semesters)
CUHP PG Result Home Page - Student Corner

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check and download their CUHP PG Result 2026 for December 2025 examinations:

items: Visit the official CUHP PG results page: https://www.cuhimachal.ac.in/index.php/Student_corner/pg_result.

On the PG results list, look for the appropriate link mentioning your course, batch, semester and exam session such as: Reappear Examination Result of MFA (Sculpture) I Sem Batch-2024. Reappear Examination Result of MSc (Bioinformatics) I Sem Batch-2023. Reappear Examination Result of MCA I Sem Batch-2024 or MCA III Sem Batch-2023. Reappear Examination Result of MA (New Media) I Sem Batch-2024 or MA (Hindu Studies) I Sem Batch-2024. Regular Examination Result of MSc (Mathematics) III Sem Batch-2024, MSc (Environmental Sciences) I Sem Batch-2025, MFA (Sculpture/Painting) III Sem Batch-2024, MA (History) I Sem Batch-2025, MA (Hindu Studies) I/III Sem Batches-2025/2024 and MA (Hindi) III Sem Batch-2024.
Reappear Examination Result of MFA (Sculpture) I Sem Batch-2024.
Reappear Examination Result of MSc (Bioinformatics) I Sem Batch-2023.
Reappear Examination Result of MCA I Sem Batch-2024 or MCA III Sem Batch-2023.
Reappear Examination Result of MA (New Media) I Sem Batch-2024 or MA (Hindu Studies) I Sem Batch-2024.

Regular Examination Result of MSc (Mathematics) III Sem Batch-2024, MSc (Environmental Sciences) I Sem Batch-2025, MFA (Sculpture/Painting) III Sem Batch-2024, MA (History) I Sem Batch-2025, MA (Hindu Studies) I/III Sem Batches-2025/2024 and MA (Hindi) III Sem Batch-2024.
Click on the relevant result link to open the PDF or result page.
If the result is published in PDF format, search for your roll number, name and batch in the list to view your marks and result status.
If the result opens through an online result portal, select your course and semester, enter your roll number/registration number and submit to view your individual marksheet.

After the result is displayed, carefully check your personal details, course title, semester, subject wise marks, total marks, SGPA/CGPA and pass/fail status and then download or print the result for future academic use and record keeping.
